languages.text: "Этот мир населяли представители самого дикого из эльдарских подвидов. Они именовали себя "Ушедшими" и имели наглость атаковать, едва я ступил на поверхность планеты и провозгласил ее принадлежащей Человечеству. Десятилетия ушли на то, чтобы истребить их всех до последнего, очистив новые владения от ксеносской мерзости. Так я принял титул Покорителя Януса".

traits.locale_text: "Этот мир населяли представители самого дикого из эльдарских подвидов. Они именовали себя "Ушедшими" и имели наглость атаковать, едва я ступил на поверхность планеты и провозгласил ее принадлежащей Человечеству. Десятилетия ушли на то, чтобы истребить их всех до последнего, очистив новые владения от ксеносской мерзости. Так я принял титул Покорителя Януса".
traits.speaker: DLC3_DL_SeberianVonValancius

languages.text: "That world was populated by the most feral of the Aeldari subspecies. They called themselves the Exodites, and they had the audacity to attack me the very moment I set foot upon the planet's surface and proclaimed it the property of Humanity. Decades were spent exterminating them to the last, purging the new holdings of all xenos filth. Thus, I earned the title Conqueror of Janus."
languages.original_text: "Этот мир населяли представители самого дикого из эльдарских подвидов. Они именовали себя "Ушедшими" и имели наглость атаковать, едва я ступил на поверхность планеты и провозгласил ее принадлежащей Человечеству. Десятилетия ушли на то, чтобы истребить их всех до последнего, очистив новые владения от ксеносской мерзости. Так я принял титул Покорителя Януса".

traits.locale_text: "That world was populated by the most feral of the Aeldari subspecies. They called themselves the Departed and had the audacity to attack me the very moment I set foot upon the planet's surface and proclaimed it the property of Humanity. Decades were spent to exterminate them to the last, purging the new holdings of xenos filth. Thus I earned the title Conqueror of Janus."

"That world was populated by the most feral of the Aeldari subspecies. Decades were spent exterminating them to the last, purging the new holdings of all xenos filth. Thus, I earned the title Conqueror of Janus."

languages.text: «Ese mundo estaba poblado por la subespecie más salvaje de los aeldari. Se hacían llamar los Exoditas, y tuvieron la audacia de atacarme en cuanto puse un pie en la superficie del planeta y lo reclamé para la Humanidad. Tardamos décadas en exterminarlos a todos y purgar nuestro nuevo mundo de toda la escoria xenos. Fue así como me gané el título de Conquistador de Janus».
languages.original_text: "That world was populated by the most feral of the Aeldari subspecies. They called themselves the Exodites, and they had the audacity to attack me the very moment I set foot upon the planet's surface and proclaimed it the property of Humanity. Decades were spent exterminating them to the last, purging the new holdings of all xenos filth. Thus, I earned the title Conqueror of Janus."

traits.locale_text: «Ese mundo estaba poblado por la subespecie más salvaje de los aeldari. Se hacían llamar los Exoditas, y tuvieron la audacia de atacarme en cuanto puse un pie en la superficie del planeta y lo reclamé para la Humanidad. Tardamos décadas en exterminarlos a todos y purgar nuestro nuevo mundo de toda la escoria xenos. Fue así como me gané el título de Conquistador de Janus».

languages.text: “那个世界曾居住着最凶蛮的艾达灵族亚种。他们自称放逐者，无比狂妄。我刚踏上行星表面，宣布那里成为人类的领地时，他们就向我发动了攻击。我花了整整几十年时间，才把他们斩尽杀绝，将这块新属地中的异形污秽彻底清除。正因如此，我获得了‘加努斯征服者’这个头衔。”
languages.original_text: "That world was populated by the most feral of the Aeldari subspecies. They called themselves the Exodites, and they had the audacity to attack me the very moment I set foot upon the planet's surface and proclaimed it the property of Humanity. Decades were spent exterminating them to the last, purging the new holdings of all xenos filth. Thus, I earned the title Conqueror of Janus."

traits.locale_text: “那个世界曾居住着最凶蛮的艾达灵族亚种。他们自称放逐者，无比狂妄。我刚踏上行星表面，宣布那里成为人类的领地时，他们就向我发动了攻击。我花了整整几十年时间，才把他们斩尽杀绝，将这块新属地中的异形污秽彻底清除。正因如此，我获得了‘加努斯征服者’这个头衔。”

languages.text: « Ce monde était peuplé d'une sous-espèce d'Aeldari particulièrement féroce. Ils se faisaient appeler les Exodites et ils ont eu l'audace de m'attaquer à l'instant même où j'ai débarqué à la surface de la planète pour en revendiquer la propriété au nom de l'humanité. Plusieurs décennies ont été nécessaires pour les exterminer jusqu'au dernier et purger cette nouvelle colonie de la souillure xénos. C'est ainsi que j'ai gagné le titre de conquérant de Janus. »
languages.original_text: "That world was populated by the most feral of the Aeldari subspecies. They called themselves the Exodites, and they had the audacity to attack me the very moment I set foot upon the planet's surface and proclaimed it the property of Humanity. Decades were spent exterminating them to the last, purging the new holdings of all xenos filth. Thus, I earned the title Conqueror of Janus."

traits.locale_text: « Ce monde était peuplé d'une sous-espèce d'Aeldari particulièrement féroce. Ils se faisaient appeler les Exodites et ils ont eu l'audace de m'attaquer à l'instant même où j'ai débarqué à la surface de la planète pour en revendiquer la propriété au nom de l'humanité. Plusieurs décennies ont été nécessaires pour les exterminer jusqu'au dernier et purger cette nouvelle colonie de la souillure xénos. C'est ainsi que j'ai gagné le titre de conquérant de Janus. »

languages.text: "O dünyada Aeldari alt türlerinin en vahşileri yaşıyordu. Kendilerine Göçenler diyorlardı. Gezegenin yüzeyine ayak bastığım ve orayı İnsanlığın mülkü ilan ettiğim anda bana saldırma cüretini gösterdiler. Sonuncusuna kadar onları yok etmek ve yeni toprakları zeno pisliğinden arındırmak için on yıllar harcandı. Böylece Janus'un Fatihi ünvanını kazandım."
languages.original_text: "That world was populated by the most feral of the Aeldari subspecies. They called themselves the Exodites, and they had the audacity to attack me the very moment I set foot upon the planet's surface and proclaimed it the property of Humanity. Decades were spent exterminating them to the last, purging the new holdings of all xenos filth. Thus, I earned the title Conqueror of Janus."

traits.locale_text: "O dünyada Aeldari alt türlerinin en vahşileri yaşıyordu. Kendilerine Göçenler diyorlardı. Gezegenin yüzeyine ayak bastığım ve orayı İnsanlığın mülkü ilan ettiğim anda bana saldırma cüretini gösterdiler. Sonuncusuna kadar onları yok etmek ve yeni toprakları zeno pisliğinden arındırmak için on yıllar harcandı. Böylece Janus'un Fatihi ünvanını kazandım."

languages.text: 「その世界は、最も野蛮なアエルダリ亜種族で溢れていた。彼らは自分たちをエグソダイトと名乗り、私がその惑星の表面に足を踏み入れ、人類の所有物であると宣言した瞬間に、私に襲いかかった。数十年が費やされ、最後の1匹まで駆逐し、新たな領土から異星生物の汚染をすべて浄化した。こうして私はヤヌスの征服者という称号を得たのだ。」
languages.original_text: "That world was populated by the most feral of the Aeldari subspecies. They called themselves the Exodites, and they had the audacity to attack me the very moment I set foot upon the planet's surface and proclaimed it the property of Humanity. Decades were spent exterminating them to the last, purging the new holdings of all xenos filth. Thus, I earned the title Conqueror of Janus."

traits.locale_text: 「その世界は、最も野蛮なアエルダリ亜種族で溢れていた。彼らは自分たちをエグソダイトと名乗り、私がその惑星の表面に足を踏み入れ、人類の所有物であると宣言した瞬間に、私に襲いかかった。数十年が費やされ、最後の1匹まで駆逐し、新たな領土から異星生物の汚染をすべて浄化した。こうして私はヤヌスの征服者という称号を得たのだ。」

languages.text: "Diese Welt wurde von der brutalsten Subspezies der Aeldari bevölkert. Sie nannten sich selbst die Abgereisten und hatten die Frechheit, mich anzugreifen, als ich den Planeten betrat und zum Eigentum der Menschheit erklärte. Es hat Jahrzehnte gedauert, sie auszulöschen und die neuen Besitzungen vom Gestank der Xenos zu befreien. So erhielt ich den Titel Eroberer von Janus."
languages.original_text: "That world was populated by the most feral of the Aeldari subspecies. They called themselves the Departed and had the audacity to attack me the very moment I set foot upon the planet's surface and proclaimed it the property of Humanity. Decades were spent to exterminate them to the last, purging the new holdings of xenos filth. Thus I earned the title Conqueror of Janus."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Welt wurde von der brutalsten Subspezies der Aeldari bevölkert. Sie nannten sich selbst die Abgereisten und hatten die Frechheit, mich anzugreifen, als ich den Planeten betrat und zum Eigentum der Menschheit erklärte. Es hat Jahrzehnte gedauert, sie auszulöschen und die neuen Besitzungen vom Gestank der Xenos zu befreien. So erhielt ich den Titel Eroberer von Janus."
